steps.title: Find the reversal
steps.content: The first sentence says viewers might assume a real deep hole has opened in the street. The next sentence reverses that assumption by explaining that Wenner created only an illusion of depth.

steps.title: Reject noncontrast signals
steps.content: Choice A signals addition, Choice C signals result, and Choice D signals sequence. The sentence needs a transition that corrects an initial impression.

steps.title: Choose contradiction
steps.content: On the contrary signals that the second sentence contrasts the apparent hole with the reality of an illusion. The answer is B.
